# Noble Collectors — AI Crawler Guidance
> Private access and evidence-backed intelligence for exceptional collector assets.

## About
Noble Collectors is a luxury collector asset platform for cultural assets, fine art, design, luxury collectibles, and memorabilia.

## Public Pages
- /en/explore — Browse public artifact collection
- /en/library — Noble Library (Heritage Atlas, Museums, Maison Heritage, Guides, Glossary)
- /en/legal-trust — Legal & Trust Center
- /en/auctions — Auction previews
- /en/heritage-passport — Heritage Passport information

## Restrictions
- /admin/*, /account/*, /seller/* — Not for AI/robots
- No private data, evidence vault, or personal information is exposed

## Stop Notes
- Noble Collectors does not provide AI-based authenticity, valuation, or certification
- Noble Collectors does not facilitate open marketplace resale
- All public content is DTO-whitelisted and reviewed
